title: Success.
content:
Success allures us in the earth and skies:
    We seek to win her, but, too amorous,
    Mocking, she flees us. Haply, were we wise,
    We would not strive and she would come to us.
meaning:
Madison Julius Cawein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Success."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
